name: Sliced Tomatoes with Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tbsp Fresh cilantro, minced (or fresh parsley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salsa ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir well and chill for 3 to 6 hours, if possible.
3. To serve, place some sprouts on individual salad plates.
4. Arrange tomato slices over the sprouts.
5. Top with salsa.
